---
title: "Boundary Models Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    df_print: paged
params:
  run_dir: ""
  script_dir: ""
  report_dir: ""
  dynamic_audit_dir: ""
  coupling_robustness_dir: ""
  cohort_name: "main"
  analysis_role: "primary"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(purrr)
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(broom.mixed)
  library(splines)
  library(knitr)
})

run_dir <- normalizePath(params$run_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
cohort_name <- params$cohort_name
analysis_role <- params$analysis_role
cohort_title <- stringr::str_to_title(stringr::str_replace_all(cohort_name, "_", " "))
report_dir <- params$report_dir
if (!nzchar(report_dir)) {
  report_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "07_stats_r", cohort_name)
}
dir.create(report_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
coupling_robustness_dir <- params$coupling_robustness_dir
if (!nzchar(coupling_robustness_dir)) {
  coupling_robustness_dir <- file.path(run_dir, "10_coupling_robustness")
}

mixed_model_control <- lmerControl(
  optimizer = "bobyqa",
  optCtrl = list(maxfun = 200000),
  calc.derivs = FALSE
)

joint_path <- file.path(run_dir, "06_model_tables", "model_joint_long.csv")
band_metric_path <- file.path(run_dir, "06_model_tables", "model_band_metric_long.csv")
if (!file.exists(joint_path)) {
  stop("Missing model table: ", joint_path)
}

read_optional_csv <- function(directory, filename) {
  path <- file.path(directory, filename)
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(tibble::tibble())
  }
  readr::read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE)
}

filter_for_cohort <- function(data, cohort_name) {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) {
    return(data)
  }
  if (cohort_name == "main") {
    return(data %>% filter(patient_main_included %in% TRUE))
  }
  if (cohort_name == "sensitivity") {
    return(data %>% filter(patient_sensitivity_included %in% TRUE))
  }
  data
}

joint_all <- readr::read_csv(joint_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
band_metric_all <- if (file.exists(band_metric_path)) {
  readr::read_csv(band_metric_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  tibble::tibble()
}

region_levels <- sort(unique(stats::na.omit(joint_all$region)))
joint <- filter_for_cohort(joint_all, cohort_name) %>%
  mutate(
    region = factor(region, levels = region_levels),
    patient = factor(patient),
    interval_id = factor(interval_id)
  )

preferred_band_levels <- c("delta", "theta", "alpha", "beta", "low_gamma", "high_gamma")
band_metric <- filter_for_cohort(band_metric_all, cohort_name)
if (nrow(band_metric) > 0) {
  present_band_levels <- unique(stats::na.omit(band_metric$band))
  band_levels <- c(
    preferred_band_levels[preferred_band_levels %in% present_band_levels],
    setdiff(sort(present_band_levels), preferred_band_levels)
  )
  band_metric <- band_metric %>%
    mutate(
      region = factor(region, levels = region_levels),
      patient = factor(patient),
      interval_id = factor(interval_id),
      band = factor(band, levels = band_levels)
    )
}

feature_candidates <- joint %>%
  count(feature_name, sort = TRUE) %>%
  filter(n >= 12) %>%
  slice_head(n = 12) %>%
  pull(feature_name)

metric_family_candidates <- if (nrow(band_metric) == 0) {
  character()
} else {
  band_metric %>%
    filter(!is.na(feature_z), !is.na(region), !is.na(band)) %>%
    group_by(metric_family) %>%
    summarise(
      n = n(),
      n_bands = n_distinct(band),
      n_regions = n_distinct(region),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    filter(n >= 24, n_bands >= 2, n_regions >= 2) %>%
    arrange(desc(n), metric_family) %>%
    pull(metric_family)
}

fit_region_model <- function(data) {
  if (n_distinct(data$region, na.rm = TRUE) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  model <- tryCatch(
    lmer(
      feature_z ~ region + is_boundary_interface + (1 | patient),
      data = data,
      control = mixed_model_control
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(model)) {
    return(list(model = model, model_type = "patient_random_intercept"))
  }
  aggregated <- data %>%
    group_by(patient, region) %>%
    summarise(
      feature_z = mean(feature_z, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_boundary_interface = max(is_boundary_interface, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  if (nrow(aggregated) < 6 || n_distinct(aggregated$region, na.rm = TRUE) < 2 || n_distinct(aggregated$patient) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  fallback_model <- tryCatch(
    lm(feature_z ~ region + is_boundary_interface + patient, data = aggregated),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(fallback_model)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  list(model = fallback_model, model_type = "patient_aggregated_fixed_effect")
}

fit_distance_model <- function(data) {
  numeric_distance <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(data$distance_mm))
  data$distance_mm <- numeric_distance
  data <- data[!is.na(data$distance_mm), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(data) < 8 || dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  tryCatch(
    lmer(
      feature_z ~ splines::ns(distance_mm, df = 3) + (1 + distance_mm | patient),
      data = data,
      control = mixed_model_control
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

fit_distance_linear_model <- function(data) {
  numeric_distance <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(data$distance_mm))
  data$distance_mm <- numeric_distance
  data <- data[!is.na(data$distance_mm), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(data) < 8 || dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  tryCatch(
    lmer(
      feature_z ~ distance_mm + (1 + distance_mm | patient),
      data = data,
      control = mixed_model_control
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
}

fit_region_band_model <- function(data) {
  data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(band), nzchar(as.character(band)))
  if (n_distinct(data$region, na.rm = TRUE) < 2 || n_distinct(data$band, na.rm = TRUE) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  model <- tryCatch(
    lmer(
      feature_z ~ region * band + is_boundary_interface + (1 | patient),
      data = data,
      control = mixed_model_control
    ),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (!is.null(model)) {
    return(list(model = model, model_type = "patient_random_intercept"))
  }
  aggregated <- data %>%
    group_by(patient, region, band) %>%
    summarise(
      feature_z = mean(feature_z, na.rm = TRUE),
      is_boundary_interface = max(is_boundary_interface, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  if (nrow(aggregated) < 8 || n_distinct(aggregated$region, na.rm = TRUE) < 2 || n_distinct(aggregated$band, na.rm = TRUE) < 2 || n_distinct(aggregated$patient) < 2) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  fallback_model <- tryCatch(
    lm(feature_z ~ region * band + is_boundary_interface + patient, data = aggregated),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )
  if (is.null(fallback_model)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  list(model = fallback_model, model_type = "patient_aggregated_fixed_effect")
}

compute_interval_morans_i <- function(data) {
  data <- data %>%
    mutate(interval_index = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(interval_index))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(feature_z), !is.na(interval_index))
  if (nrow(data) < 3) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      morans_i = NA_real_,
      expectation = NA_real_,
      variance = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      note = "insufficient_intervals"
    ))
  }
  data <- data %>% arrange(interval_index)
  n <- nrow(data)
  weights_matrix <- matrix(0, nrow = n, ncol = n)
  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    current <- data$interval_index[i]
    neighbors <- which(abs(data$interval_index - current) == 1)
    neighbors <- neighbors[neighbors != i]
    if (length(neighbors) > 0) {
      weights_matrix[i, neighbors] <- 1 / length(neighbors)
    }
  }
  total_weight <- sum(weights_matrix)
  if (total_weight == 0) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      morans_i = NA_real_,
      expectation = NA_real_,
      variance = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      note = "no_adjacent_neighbors"
    ))
  }
  x <- data$feature_z
  x_centered <- x - mean(x)
  numerator <- n / total_weight * sum(weights_matrix * outer(x_centered, x_centered))
  denominator <- sum(x_centered^2)
  morans_i <- numerator / denominator
  expectation <- -1 / (n - 1)
  z_score <- (morans_i - expectation) / sqrt(1 / n)
  p_value <- 2 * stats::pnorm(abs(z_score), lower.tail = FALSE)
  tibble::tibble(
    morans_i = as.numeric(morans_i),
    expectation = as.numeric(expectation),
    variance = as.numeric(1 / n),
    p.value = as.numeric(p_value),
    note = "adjacent_interval_index_graph_approx"
  )
}

role_label <- function(feature_name) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    feature_name == "mec_omega_0.5" ~ "mec",
    feature_name == "mpc_omega_0.5" ~ "mpc",
    stringr::str_detect(feature_name, "average_controllability_mean$") ~ "average_controllability",
    stringr::str_detect(feature_name, "modal_controllability_mean$") ~ "modal_controllability",
    stringr::str_detect(feature_name, "fragility_mean$") ~ "neural_fragility",
    stringr::str_detect(feature_name, "rate_per_min$") ~ "hfo_rate",
    stringr::str_detect(feature_name, "source_sink_index$") ~ "source_sink_index",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

safe_spearman <- function(data, x_col, y_col) {
  data <- data %>% filter(!is.na(.data[[x_col]]), !is.na(.data[[y_col]]))
  if (nrow(data) < 4 || n_distinct(data[[x_col]]) < 2 || n_distinct(data[[y_col]]) < 2) {
    return(tibble::tibble(rho = NA_real_, p.value = NA_real_, n = nrow(data)))
  }
  test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(data[[x_col]], data[[y_col]], method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  tibble::tibble(rho = unname(test$estimate), p.value = test$p.value, n = nrow(data))
}

region_results <- purrr::map_dfr(feature_candidates, function(feature_name) {
  data <- joint %>% filter(feature_name == !!feature_name, !is.na(feature_z))
  fitted <- fit_region_model(data)
  if (is.null(fitted)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      feature_name = feature_name,
      term = NA_character_,
      estimate = NA_real_,
      std.error = NA_real_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      model_type = NA_character_,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient)
    ))
  }
  broom.mixed::tidy(fitted$model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      feature_name = feature_name,
      model_type = fitted$model_type,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient)
    )
})

distance_results <- purrr::map_dfr(feature_candidates, function(feature_name) {
  data <- joint %>% filter(feature_name == !!feature_name, !is.na(feature_z))
  model <- fit_distance_model(data)
  if (is.null(model)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      feature_name = feature_name,
      term = NA_character_,
      estimate = NA_real_,
      std.error = NA_real_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient)
    ))
  }
  broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      feature_name = feature_name,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient)
    )
})

distance_linear_results <- purrr::map_dfr(feature_candidates, function(feature_name) {
  data <- joint %>% filter(feature_name == !!feature_name, !is.na(feature_z))
  model <- fit_distance_linear_model(data)
  if (is.null(model)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      feature_name = feature_name,
      term = NA_character_,
      estimate = NA_real_,
      std.error = NA_real_,
      statistic = NA_real_,
      p.value = NA_real_,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient)
    ))
  }
  broom.mixed::tidy(model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      feature_name = feature_name,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient)
    )
})

region_band_results <- purrr::map_dfr(metric_family_candidates, function(metric_family) {
  data <- band_metric %>% filter(metric_family == !!metric_family, !is.na(feature_z))
  feature_domain <- data %>%
    pull(feature_family) %>%
    stats::na.omit() %>%
    unique()
  feature_domain <- if (length(feature_domain) > 0) feature_domain[[1]] else NA_character_
  fitted <- fit_region_band_model(data)
  if (is.null(fitted)) {
    return(
      tibble::tibble(
        cohort = cohort_name,
        analysis_role = analysis_role,
        metric_family = metric_family,
        feature_family = feature_domain,
        term = NA_character_,
        estimate = NA_real_,
        std.error = NA_real_,
        statistic = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        model_type = NA_character_,
        n_rows = nrow(data),
        n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient),
        n_bands = dplyr::n_distinct(data$band)
      )
    )
  }
  broom.mixed::tidy(fitted$model, effects = "fixed") %>%
    mutate(
      cohort = cohort_name,
      analysis_role = analysis_role,
      metric_family = metric_family,
      feature_family = feature_domain,
      model_type = fitted$model_type,
      n_rows = nrow(data),
      n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(data$patient),
      n_bands = dplyr::n_distinct(data$band)
    )
})

if ("p.value" %in% names(region_results)) {
  region_results <- region_results %>%
    mutate(
      p_fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      p_bonferroni = p.adjust(p.value, method = "bonferroni")
    )
}
if ("p.value" %in% names(distance_results)) {
  distance_results <- distance_results %>%
    mutate(
      p_fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      p_bonferroni = p.adjust(p.value, method = "bonferroni")
    )
}
if ("p.value" %in% names(distance_linear_results)) {
  distance_linear_results <- distance_linear_results %>%
    mutate(
      p_fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      p_bonferroni = p.adjust(p.value, method = "bonferroni")
    )
}
if ("p.value" %in% names(region_band_results)) {
  region_band_results <- region_band_results %>%
    mutate(
      p_fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method = "BH"),
      p_bonferroni = p.adjust(p.value, method = "bonferroni")
    )
}

moran_results <- joint %>%
  filter(feature_name %in% feature_candidates, !is.na(feature_z)) %>%
  group_by(feature_name, patient) %>%
  group_modify(~ compute_interval_morans_i(.x)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(cohort = cohort_name, analysis_role = analysis_role)

role_wide <- joint %>%
  mutate(feature_role = role_label(feature_name)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(feature_role), !is.na(feature_z)) %>%
  group_by(patient, session, run, interval_id, interval_index, region, distance_mm, is_boundary_interface, feature_role) %>%
  summarise(feature_z = mean(feature_z, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = feature_role, values_from = feature_z, values_fn = mean)

hfo_consistency_results <- purrr::map_dfr(
  c("mec", "average_controllability", "neural_fragility", "source_sink_index"),
  function(network_feature) {
    if (!all(c("hfo_rate", network_feature) %in% names(role_wide))) {
      return(tibble::tibble(
        cohort = cohort_name,
        analysis_role = analysis_role,
        network_feature = network_feature,
        patient = NA,
        rho = NA_real_,
        p.value = NA_real_,
        n = 0
      ))
    }
    role_wide %>%
      group_by(patient) %>%
      group_modify(~ safe_spearman(.x, "hfo_rate", network_feature)) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      mutate(cohort = cohort_name, analysis_role = analysis_role, network_feature = network_feature)
  }
)

robustness_summary <- read_optional_csv(coupling_robustness_dir, "robustness_summary.csv")
if (nrow(robustness_summary) > 0) {
  robustness_summary <- robustness_summary %>%
    filter(cohort == cohort_name)
}
stability_matrix <- read_optional_csv(coupling_robustness_dir, "stability_matrix.csv")
if (nrow(stability_matrix) > 0) {
  stability_matrix <- stability_matrix %>%
    filter(cohort == cohort_name)
}
robustness_status <- if (nrow(robustness_summary) > 0) "available" else "unavailable"

cohort_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  run_dir = run_dir,
  cohort = cohort_name,
  cohort_title = cohort_title,
  analysis_role = analysis_role,
  n_rows = nrow(joint),
  n_band_metric_rows = nrow(band_metric),
  n_patients = dplyr::n_distinct(joint$patient),
  n_intervals = if (nrow(joint) == 0) 0L else joint %>% distinct(patient, interval_id) %>% nrow(),
  n_features_modeled = length(feature_candidates),
  n_band_metric_families_modeled = length(metric_family_candidates),
  robustness_status = robustness_status
)

workflow_status <- tibble::tibble(
  cohort = cohort_name,
  analysis_role = analysis_role,
  workflow = c(
    "region_model",
    "distance_spline",
    "distance_linear",
    "region_band_interaction",
    "morans_i",
    "hfo_network_consistency",
    "coupling_robustness"
  ),
  status = c(
    if (nrow(region_results) > 0 && any(!is.na(region_results$term))) "completed" else "insufficient_data",
    if (nrow(distance_results) > 0 && any(!is.na(distance_results$term))) "completed" else "insufficient_data",
    if (nrow(distance_linear_results) > 0 && any(!is.na(distance_linear_results$term))) "completed" else "insufficient_data",
    if (nrow(region_band_results) > 0 && any(!is.na(region_band_results$term))) "completed" else "insufficient_data",
    if (nrow(moran_results) > 0 && any(!is.na(moran_results$morans_i))) "completed" else "insufficient_data",
    if (nrow(hfo_consistency_results) > 0 && any(!is.na(hfo_consistency_results$rho))) "completed" else "insufficient_data",
    robustness_status
  ),
  n_rows = c(
    nrow(region_results),
    nrow(distance_results),
    nrow(distance_linear_results),
    nrow(region_band_results),
    nrow(moran_results),
    nrow(hfo_consistency_results),
    nrow(robustness_summary)
  ),
  n_patients = cohort_summary$n_patients[[1]]
)

readr::write_csv(region_results, file.path(report_dir, "region_model_results.csv"))
readr::write_csv(distance_results, file.path(report_dir, "distance_spline_results.csv"))
readr::write_csv(distance_linear_results, file.path(report_dir, "distance_linear_results.csv"))
readr::write_csv(region_band_results, file.path(report_dir, "region_band_interaction_results.csv"))
readr::write_csv(moran_results, file.path(report_dir, "morans_i_results.csv"))
readr::write_csv(role_wide %>% mutate(cohort = cohort_name, analysis_role = analysis_role), file.path(report_dir, "joint_feature_role_wide.csv"))
readr::write_csv(hfo_consistency_results, file.path(report_dir, "hfo_network_consistency_results.csv"))
readr::write_csv(robustness_summary, file.path(report_dir, "coupling_robustness_summary.csv"))
readr::write_csv(stability_matrix, file.path(report_dir, "coupling_stability_matrix.csv"))
readr::write_csv(cohort_summary, file.path(report_dir, "cohort_summary.csv"))
readr::write_csv(workflow_status, file.path(report_dir, "workflow_status.csv"))
readr::write_csv(cohort_summary, file.path(report_dir, "stats_summary.csv"))
```

## Run Summary

```{r}
knitr::kable(cohort_summary)
```

## Workflow Status

```{r}
knitr::kable(workflow_status)
```

## Region Model Results

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(region_results, 30))
```

## Distance Spline Results

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(distance_results, 30))
```

## Region By Band Interaction

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(region_band_results, 30))
```

## Moran's I Diagnostics

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(moran_results, 30))
```

## HFO Network Consistency

```{r}
knitr::kable(head(hfo_consistency_results, 30))
```

## Coupling Robustness

```{r}
if (nrow(robustness_summary) == 0) {
  knitr::kable(tibble::tibble(note = "Robustness classification unavailable for this run."))
} else {
  knitr::kable(robustness_summary)
}
```

## Stability Matrix

```{r}
if (nrow(stability_matrix) == 0) {
  knitr::kable(tibble::tibble(note = "Stability matrix unavailable for this run."))
} else {
  knitr::kable(stability_matrix)
}
```
